summary: Replaced proximity-threshold constellation line system with topology-based geometric placement. Created topologyDefinitions.ts with vertex/edge tables for tetrahedron (4v/6e), octahedron (6v/12e), and icosahedron (12v/30e). Created topologyInstances.ts for seeded scattering with quaternion rotation, scale variation (0.3-0.7), and minimum separation enforcement. Reworked constellationLines.ts to generate its own geometry from topology instances instead of connecting nearby point cloud positions. Added maxTopologyInstances to QualityProfile (low=0, medium=8, high=15) with COUNT_MINIMUMS=0 allowing full disable. Added constellation case to extractSystemConfig. All 1602 tests pass, build succeeds.
